404.when: Version slug does not match a file in dist/knowledge/, or version slug fails the /^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/ regex.
examples: GET /knowledge/v9.9.9.json → 404 { "error": "Knowledge bundle not found for v9.9.9" }

500.when: Bundle file exists but fails formatKnowledgeBundle validation (e.g. dist/knowledge/ was corrupted at runtime).

cache_contract.boot_time: Each bundle file is read from disk ONCE at server boot via fs.readFileSync and held in memory. No disk I/O on request path.
cache_contract.http_headers: Cache-Control: public, max-age=3600 (1 hour) — clients SHOULD revalidate hourly. Server-side cache is invalidated by container restart (every deploy).
cache_contract.mcp_resource: MCP server enumerates dist/knowledge/*.json at every ListResources call (cheap directory listing); ReadResource serves from the same boot-time in-memory cache.

consumers: MCP clients listing algovault://knowledge/* resources via tools/list ResourceTemplate
drift_check_command: curl -fsS https://api.algovault.com/knowledge/latest.json | jq -e 'has("version") and has("generated_at") and has("tools") and has("response_shapes") and has("integrations") and has("examples") and has("discussions") and (has("outcome_return_pct") | not)' >/dev/null && echo DRIFT_CHECK_OK || echo DRIFT_CHECK_FAIL
notes: Mr.1-approved 2026-05-18 (KNOWLEDGE-ARTIFACT-W1 Plan-Mode Q-1): drift_check_command mirrors the R3 KnowledgeBundle interface exactly, including has("discussions"). Spec line 88 originally asserted has("pages") — that field does NOT exist in R3 interface; dropped per Plan-Mode resolution.

Two-sided PII guard (Q-3): build-time generator runs /"(outcome_return_pct|outcome_price)"\s*:\s*[-\d.]/ against JSON.stringify(bundle) to deny VALUE bindings; vitest canary additionally asserts response_shapes[*].forbidden_keys contains "outcome_return_pct" to REQUIRE the metadata listing.

forbidden_keys array is documentary; the formatter (src/lib/knowledge-formatter.ts) is allow-list, not deny-list — extra keys in raw input are silently dropped, so the only way a forbidden key could reach the public shape is via an allow-listed field (impossible for outcome_return_pct since no field is typed to carry it).
